mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_INFO (MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, ROLE, PHONE, EMAIL) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, NAME AS name, ROLE AS role, PHONE AS phone, EMAIL AS email FROM USER_INFO ORDER BY ROLE DESC, MEMBER_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_INFO SET ROLE = #{role} WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
